# Feldera

[https://www.feldera.com/](https://www.feldera.com/)

![](https://img.shields.io/badge/memtables-not%20supported-red?style=flat-square) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/inputs-Feldera%20pipeline%20tables-blue?style=flat-square) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/outputs-pandas%20%7C%20PyArrow-orange?style=flat-square)

## Install

Install Ibis and dependencies for the Feldera backend:

::: {.panel-tabset}

## `pip`

Install with the `feldera` extra:

```{.bash}
pip install 'ibis-framework[feldera]'
```

And connect:

```{.python}
import ibis

con = ibis.feldera.connect(host="http://localhost:8080", pipeline="my_pipeline")
```

1. Adjust connection parameters as needed.

## `conda`

Install for Feldera:

```{.bash}
conda install -c conda-forge ibis-feldera
```

And connect:

```{.python}
import ibis

con = ibis.feldera.connect(host="http://localhost:8080", pipeline="my_pipeline")
```

1. Adjust connection parameters as needed.

## `mamba`

Install for Feldera:

```{.bash}
mamba install -c conda-forge ibis-feldera
```

And connect:

```{.python}
import ibis

con = ibis.feldera.connect(host="http://localhost:8080", pipeline="my_pipeline")
```

1. Adjust connection parameters as needed.

:::

## Connect

### `ibis.feldera.connect`

```python
con = ibis.feldera.connect(
    host="http://localhost:8080",
    pipeline="my_pipeline",
    api_key=None,
)
```

::: {.callout-note}
`ibis.feldera.connect` is a thin wrapper around
[`ibis.backends.feldera.Backend.do_connect`](#ibis.backends.feldera.Backend.do_connect).
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
The Feldera backend does **not** support connection URLs; use
`ibis.feldera.connect(host=..., pipeline=...)` instead.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
Feldera tables must be declared in the pipeline's SQL program before they can
be queried.  `create_table(obj=df)` can only push data into an existing
materialized table; it cannot define new tables ad hoc.
:::

### Connection Parameters

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from _utils import render_do_connect

render_do_connect("feldera")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
BACKEND = "Feldera"
```

{{< include ./_templates/api.qmd >}}
